hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.env.production|*/key.pem|*/package-lock.json) echo "BLOCKED: $f is a protected file. Edit it manually outside Claude." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [ -f "$f" ] && case "$f" in *.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.mjs|*.cjs) (cd "$(dirname "$f")" && npx biome format --write "$f") ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
